note: Per-yacht facts for the hotel-brand yachts in the Yacht Atlas (data/atlas/yacht/itinerary.json). `ship` matches the itinerary spelling exactly for joins. Figures compiled July 2026 from brand materials — suite counts and capacities are as published and may shift through launch seasons; verify before quoting.

ships.notes: The ship that invented the hotel-brand yacht category; aft marina, no buffets, Med and Caribbean seasons.
Larger second-generation hull; two-story loft suites.
Sister to Ilma; extends the fleet to Asia-Pacific seasons.
Highest space-per-guest ratio in the category; 11-room Funnel Suite; residential layouts with sea-level marina.
Three-masted SolidSail rig — the world's largest sailing-yacht silhouette; Accor's Orient Express marque at sea.
Sister to Corinthian; on sale ahead of delivery.
Aman at Sea's first motoryacht; Aman spa-to-guest ratios afloat. Pre-launch figures — confirm at booking.
